categories.name: Tokenized Credit
categories.content: Tokens representing on-chain claims on debt instruments. Returns come from interest income and credit performance of the underlying borrowers, key risk dimensions are credit/default risk, seniority in the structure, and duration for fixed-rate instruments.

categories.name: Morpho Ecosystem
categories.content: Vault tokens within the Morpho Protocol.

categories.name: Midas Liquid Yield Tokens
categories.content: Midas Liquid Yield Tokens refer to liquid yield tokens issued by Midas and offered on https://midas.app/.

categories.name: ERC20i
categories.content: ERC20i is a token standard on Base blockchain that extends the capabilities of ERC-20 tokens by adding native inscriptions.

categories.name: Tokenized Treasuries
categories.content: Tokenized Treasuries feature blockchain-native representations of marketable sovereign debt including T-bills, T-notes, and T-bonds that offer 24/7 on-chain access to yields through regulated, asset-backed tokens.

categories.name: Yield Tokenization Product
categories.content: Yield tokenization product refers to converting the expected future yield or returns from an asset into tradable tokens on a blockchain, allowing for the trading, management, and optimization of yield independently from the underlying asset.

categories.name: ST0x Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokenized public equities and capital market instruments issued on the st0x.io platform.

categories.name: Parody Meme
categories.content: Meme coins which are inspired by the names of well-known brands, individuals, or cultural icons.

categories.name: Insurance
categories.content: Decentralized insurance provides the infrastructure for members to buy cover, underwrite risk, assess claims, and build risk management businesses.

categories.name: Tokenized Assets
categories.content: Tokenized products refers to digital representation of assets on a blockchain platform.

categories.name: Camelot Launchpad
categories.content: Camelot Launchpad is a platform for crypto projects to hold Initial DEX Offerings (IDOs). Participants are able to gain early access to public and special token sales on the platform.

categories.name: Bridged WBNB
categories.content: Bridged WBNB refers to Wrapped BNB that has been transferred from its native blockchain to a different blockchain through "bridging".

categories.name: Bridged DAI
categories.content: Bridged DAI refers to DAI that has been transferred from its native blockchain to a different blockchain through "bridging'.

categories.name: Liquid Staked HYPE
categories.content: Liquid staked HYPE is a tokenized representation of staked HYPE that can be traded or used in various DeFi applications.

categories.name: Bridged-Tokens
categories.content: Bridged-tokens refers to a token that has been transferred or "bridged" from one blockchain to another, typically through the use of a blockchain bridge.

categories.name: CreatorBid Ecosystem
categories.content: CreatorBid Ecosystem consists of tokens launched via creator.bid.

categories.name: Real World Assets (RWA)
categories.content: Real World Assets (RWAs) refer to tangible or physical assets that have value in the real world. The tokenization of RWAs involves representing these assets digitally on a blockchain, allowing for fractional ownership, increased liquidity, and more efficient management and trading of these assets.

categories.name: Nest Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokens representing permissionless and non-custodial deposits into curated Real-World Asset (RWA) vaults on the Nest protocol.

categories.name: Arcade Games
categories.content: Classic-style games with simple mechanics, high replayability, and score-based progression.

categories.name: Strata Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokenized structured yield products issued by Strata (https://app.strata.markets/) that split yields from underlying on-chain or off-chain strategies to offer tailored risk-reward profiles, along with any native governance or utility tokens of the protocol.
